mapper.sql:
WHERE deleted = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.username}, '%')
AND mobile LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.mobile}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, username, nickname, mobile, email, status, last_login_time, created_time, updated_time FROM sys_user
ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, username, nickname, mobile, email, status, last_login_time, created_time, updated_time FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( id, username, password, nickname, mobile, email, status, deleted, last_login_time, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{status}, 0, NULL, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET nickname = #{nickname}, mobile = #{mobile}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status}, updated_by = 0, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1, updated_by = 0, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user_role ( user_id, role_id ) VALUES
(#{userId}, #{roleId})
mapper.select: SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY role_id
